commands: aws ssm get-parameter --name /academy/api/env --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ap-northeast-2 | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); open("/opt/api.env","w").write(chr(10).join(k+"="+str(v) for k,v in d.items()))' && IMG=$(docker inspect academy-api --format '{{.Config.Image}}' 2>/dev/null) && docker stop academy-api 2>/dev/null; docker rm academy-api 2>/dev/null; docker run -d --restart unless-stopped --name academy-api -p 8000:8000 --env-file /opt/api.env $IMG && grep VIDEO_BATCH /opt/api.env 2>/dev/null || echo done
